sEn: Qwen2.5-1M extends context to 1M tokens with enhanced long-context capabilities, efficient inference framework, and open-source models.
sZh: Qwen2.5-1M 将上下文长度扩展到100万tokens，通过长上下文预训练和后训练显著提升性能，并开源推理框架实现3-7倍加速。
absEn: We introduce Qwen2.5-1M, a series of models that extend the context length to 1 million tokens. Compared to the previous 128K version, the Qwen2.5-1M series have significantly enhanced long-context capabilities through long-context pre-training and post-training. Key techniques such as long data synthesis, progressive pre-training, and multi-stage supervised fine-tuning are employed to effectively enhance long-context performance while reducing training costs. To promote the use of long-context models among a broader user base, we present and open-source our inference framework. This framework includes a length extrapolation method that can expand the model context lengths by at least four times, or even more, without additional training. To reduce inference costs, we implement a sparse attention method along with chunked prefill optimization for deployment scenarios and a sparsity refinement method to improve precision. Additionally, we detail our optimizations in the inference engine, including kernel optimization, pipeline parallelism, and scheduling optimization, which significantly enhance overall inference performance. By leveraging our inference framework, the Qwen2.5-1M models achieve a remarkable 3x to 7x prefill speedup in scenarios with 1 million tokens of context. This framework provides an efficient and powerful solution for developing applications that require long-context processing using open-source models. The Qwen2.5-1M series currently includes the open-source models Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M and Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct-1M, as well as the API-accessed model Qwen2.5-Turbo. Evaluations show that Qwen2.5-1M models have been greatly improved in long-context tasks without compromising performance in short-context scenarios. Specifically, the Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct-1M model significantly outperforms GPT-4o-mini in long-context tasks and supports contexts eight times longer.
absZh: 我们介绍了Qwen2.5-1M系列模型，该系列将上下文长度扩展到100万tokens。与之前的128K版本相比，Qwen2.5-1M系列通过长上下文预训练和后训练显著增强了长上下文能力。我们采用了长数据合成、渐进式预训练和多阶段监督微调等关键技术，在降低训练成本的同时有效提升了长上下文性能。为了促进长上下文模型在更广泛用户群体中的应用，我们提出并开源了推理框架。该框架包含一种长度外推方法，无需额外训练即可将模型上下文长度扩展至少四倍，甚至更多。为了降低推理成本，我们针对部署场景实现了稀疏注意力方法和分块预填充优化，并采用稀疏性精炼方法提高精度。此外，我们详细介绍了推理引擎中的优化，包括内核优化、流水线并行和调度优化，这些优化显著提升了整体推理性能。通过利用我们的推理框架，Qwen2.5-1M模型在100万tokens上下文场景下实现了3到7倍的预填充加速。该框架为使用开源模型开发需要长上下文处理的应用提供了高效且强大的解决方案。Qwen2.5-1M系列目前包括开源模型Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M和Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct-1M，以及API访问模型Qwen2.5-Turbo。评估表明，Qwen2.5-1M模型在长上下文任务中得到了极大改进，同时未损害短上下文场景的性能。具体来说，Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct-1M模型在长上下文任务中显著优于GPT-4o-mini，并支持八倍更长的上下文。

contrib.en: Extends context length to 1 million tokens via long-context pre-training and post-training.
contrib.zh: 通过长上下文预训练和后训练，将上下文长度扩展到100万词元。

contrib.en: Employs long data synthesis, progressive pre-training, and multi-stage supervised fine-tuning.
contrib.zh: 采用长数据合成、渐进式预训练和多阶段监督微调技术。

contrib.en: Open-sources an inference framework with length extrapolation for 4x+ context expansion without training.
contrib.zh: 开源推理框架，包含无需训练即可实现4倍以上上下文扩展的长度外推方法。

contrib.en: Implements sparse attention and chunked prefill optimization to reduce inference costs.
contrib.zh: 实现稀疏注意力和分块预填充优化以降低推理成本。

contrib.en: Achieves 3x to 7x prefill speedup for 1 million token contexts via kernel, pipeline, and scheduling optimizations.
contrib.zh: 通过内核、流水线和调度优化，在100万词元上下文中实现3到7倍的预填充加速。

contrib.en: Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct-1M outperforms GPT-4o-mini in long-context tasks with 8x longer support.
contrib.zh: Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct-1M在长上下文任务中显著优于GPT-4o-mini，且支持8倍更长的上下文。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to specific benchmarks; real-world long-context performance may vary.
limits.zh: 评估限于特定基准；实际长上下文性能可能有所不同。

limits.en: Inference framework optimizations may not generalize to all hardware or model sizes.
limits.zh: 推理框架优化可能无法推广到所有硬件或模型规模。

limits.en: Length extrapolation method may degrade quality for extremely long contexts beyond tested range.
limits.zh: 长度外推方法在超出测试范围的极长上下文中可能降低质量。

limits.en: Sparse attention and chunked prefill may introduce precision trade-offs in some tasks.
limits.zh: 稀疏注意力和分块预填充可能在某些任务中引入精度权衡。
